node.title: Uber Scaled Solutions - Generative AI | Part time job opportunity

topic.title: Uber Scaled Solutions - Generative AI | Part time job opportunity

post.content:
This was a part time job opportunity shared by one of the directors in Uber via [this Linkedin post](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/nandakishoret_uber-coding-gen-ai-activity-7208370103896219648-tBEp?utm_source=share&utm_medium=member_desktop). 
The process starts after filling [this google form](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLScO1u1FmtYJtRLbixNZxpeDUpHN9Zkl7cTD7O90stlUOhNI2Q/viewform). After a day of filling the form, you'll receive a online coding test link.

**Note: The linkedin post was shared on 18th June 2024. Because not a long time has passed since then, I think they are still accepting responses.**

To read the test questions and a way to outsmart the coding platform please read [my notion article here](https://garmadon.notion.site/Uber-scaled-solutions-Generative-AI-ddc40726ddaa4a578e20db7e16285ffc?pvs=4). *(I'm not posting the questions here as it'll be time consuming for me to maintain 2 posts - notion and leetcode)*

Please upvote so that others can quickly find this post.
Hey, I\'ve received the selection mail, Any Idea, What tasks are we supposed to do?\n
Any idea, how much they will pay ?
Anyone applying in September? I know I\'m late, but I\'m hoping this position is still open (that is if it is even legit)... \n
Hi i have also cleared the GenAI test but after couple of tasks they are\'t assigning any tasks to me anyone have any idea about this pls reply
